productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Tan Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Concealed elastic goes on the sides for a custom Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip-on style for easy on/off Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole strategically grooved for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
